title: Output audio ducking during recording
created_from: user request to suppress Mac playback audio while dictating

follow_ups.title: Expose audio ducking controls in a settings panel
follow_ups.reason: The first implementation uses JSON/config defaults; a future app panel should allow non-technical users to change the setting.

follow_ups.title: Evaluate voice processing or echo cancellation capture modes
follow_ups.reason: Playback ducking reduces self-playback leakage but does not handle room noise or true acoustic echo cancellation.
